creator: dave@jetcafe.org
text:
(In reply to Ivan Rozhuk from comment #34)

I am not a FreeBSD committer or ports builder, so I can't speak for them. 

I would like to think there would be a major rebuild just because of this. However, given that 13.2 is nearing a release, I would presume that this major rebuild of all public ports and packages would happen during or soon after.
